TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Misacepo‚Äô, title = Misacepo‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Misacepo‚Äô} }

S.FORM: Misacepo' "Misacepo' "hananay no Pangcah, no Saetip a Pangcah miladis han, no Pasawali i misacepo' han, no Falangaw i mikesi' han. O sowal to " misacepo'" sanay itiniay i Fakong no Kalingko niyaro' no Makotaay sowal sa tonian, " Nano ratoh a sowal, na itiraay i Nang-yan ko Pangcah, icowaay a pala awaay to ko mafanaay, nawhani na mico'a'ang to misangaay a kawas, matefoc no kawas sa palenlen han nira a mihadefek. Deng to ya tatosaay malekakaay madipot no riyar a kawas sa mapawpaw tahira toni kanatal no Taywan, saka manga'ay to nangra itini parayray to teloc. Oni na mapawpaway milakecay a tato'asan no Pangcah, o piaray no faloco' to pidipot no riyar a kawas, saka maraod to koya paherekan talahekal a romi'ad, misalisin to toya kawas no riyar ". O roma i,.mingataay to riyar ko niyaro' no Makotaay, mikiriyaray ko 'orip no niyaro' a .tamdaw. O lalowadan to pisacepo' a demak, o pinanay ato palemed to pacefongay a mifoting ko makadofah ko pifoting a tamdaw no niyaro', ta fangcal to ko pinokay a paherek, onini i o patalahekal to 'icel no mikilotokay mikiriyaray a ma'orip a pinangan no serangawan koni, roma i o papinang to kalacecay no karikec ato kalacecay a ma'orip. I'ayaw no pacefong, polong a kapah no niyaro' masa'opo i taloan, o mato'asay no finacadan, o citanengay a tamdaw pakafana' to saiasalil a mifoting, ato pakafana' to ano tata'ak ko tapelik no riyal samanen a mifoting sanay a tanmeng. Mikapotay to pisacepo' saheto o kasaselal a tamdaw, marapot ko mato'asay, sasifo'an ato kapah, tati'ih mingata ko fafahiyan ato mikapot, i'ayaw no pisacepo'an a dadaya pacefong to a mifoting, malo sapato'aya to kawas no riyar, pakilacen ko finawlan mapolong a komaen.
S.PHON: misa ¶…ôpo~u ° "misa ¶…ôpo~u ° "ńßananaj no~u paŇč ¶ańß, no~u sa…ôtip a paŇč ¶ańß mi…ĺa…¨~…ģis ńßan, no~u pasawa…ĺi i misa ¶…ôpo~u ° ńßan, no~u fa…ĺaŇčaw i mik…ôsi ° ńßan. o~u so~uwa…ĺ to~u " misa ¶…ôpo~u °" sanaj itiniaj i fako~uŇč no~u ka…ĺiŇčko~u nijaro~u ° no~u mako~utaaj so~uwa…ĺ sa to~unian, " nano~u rato~uńß a so~uwa…ĺ, na itiraaj i naŇč-jan ko~u paŇč ¶ańß, i ¶o~uwaaj a pa…ĺa awaaj to~u ko~u mafanaaj, nawńßani na mi ¶o~u °a °aŇč to~u misaŇčaaj a kawas, mat…ôfo~u ¶ no~u kawas sa pa…ĺ…ôn…ĺ…ôn ńßan nira a mińßa…¨~…ģ…ôf…ôk. …¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ja tato~usaaj ma…ĺ…ôkakaaj ma…¨~…ģipo~ut no~u rijar a kawas sa mapawpaw tańßira to~uni kanata…ĺ no~u tajwan, saka maŇča °aj to~u naŇčra itini parajraj to~u t…ô…ĺo~u ¶. o~uni na mapawpawaj mi…ĺak…ô ¶aj a tato~u °asan no~u paŇč ¶ańß, o~u piaraj no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u pi…¨~…ģipo~ut no~u rijar a kawas, saka marao~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~uja pańß…ôr…ôkan ta…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, misa…ĺisin to~u to~uja kawas no~u rijar ". o~u ro~uma i,.miŇčataaj to~u rijar ko~u nijaro~u ° no~u mako~utaaj, mikirijaraj ko~u °o~urip no~u nijaro~u ° a .tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u …ĺa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģan to~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° a …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u pinanaj ato~u pa…ĺ…ôm…ô…¨~…ģ to~u pa ¶…ôfo~uŇčaj a mifo~utiŇč ko~u maka…¨~…ģo~ufańß ko~u pifo~utiŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw no~u nijaro~u °, ta faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u ko~u pino~ukaj a pańß…ôr…ôk, o~unini i o~u pata…ĺańß…ôka…ĺ to~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u miki…ĺo~uto~ukaj mikirijaraj a ma °o~urip a pinaŇčan no~u s…ôraŇčawan ko~uni, ro~uma i o~u papinaŇč to~u ka…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj no~u karik…ô ¶ ato~u ka…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj a ma °o~urip. i °ajaw no~u pa ¶…ôfo~uŇč, po~u…ĺo~uŇč a kapańß no~u nijaro~u ° masa °o~upo~u i ta…ĺo~uan, o~u mato~u °asaj no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u ¶itan…ôŇčaj a tam…¨~…ģaw pakafana ° to~u saiasa…ĺi…ĺ a mifo~utiŇč, ato~u pakafana ° to~u ano~u tata °ak ko~u tap…ô…ĺik no~u rija…ĺ saman…ôn a mifo~utiŇč sanaj a tanm…ôŇč. mikapo~utaj to~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u ° sańß…ôto~u o~u kasas…ô…ĺa…ĺ a tam…¨~…ģaw, marapo~ut ko~u mato~u °asaj, sasifo~u °an ato~u kapańß, tati °ińß miŇčata ko~u fafańßijan ato~u mikapo~ut, i °ajaw no~u pisa ¶…ôpo~u °an a …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja pa ¶…ôfo~uŇč to~u a mifo~utiŇč, ma…ĺo~u sapato~u °aja to~u kawas no~u rijar, paki…ĺa ¶…ôn ko~u finaw…ĺan mapo~u…ĺo~uŇč a ko~uma…ôn.
S.FORM: Misacepo' "Misacepo' "hananay no Pangcah, no Saetip a Pangcah miladis han, no Pasawali i misacepo' han, no Falangaw i mikesi' han. O sowal to " misacepo'" sanay itiniay i Fakong no Kalingko niyaro' no Makotaay sowal sa tonian, " Nano ratoh a sowal, na itiraay i Nang-yan ko Pangcah, icowaay a pala awaay to ko mafanaay, nawhani na mico'a'ang to misangaay a kawas, matefoc no kawas sa palenlen han nira a mihadefek. Deng to ya tatosaay malekakaay madipot no riyar a kawas sa mapawpaw tahira toni kanatal no Taywan, saka manga'ay to nangra itini parayray to teloc. Oni na mapawpaway milakecay a tato'asan no Pangcah, o piaray no faloco' to pidipot no riyar a kawas, saka maraod to koya paherekan talahekal a romi'ad, misalisin to toya kawas no riyar ". O roma i,.mingataay to riyar ko niyaro' no Makotaay, mikiriyaray ko 'orip no niyaro' a .tamdaw. O lalowadan to pisacepo' a demak, o pinanay ato palemed to pacefongay a mifoting ko makadofah ko pifoting a tamdaw no niyaro', ta fangcal to ko pinokay a paherek, onini i o patalahekal to 'icel no mikilotokay mikiriyaray a ma'orip a pinangan no serangawan koni, roma i o papinang to kalacecay no karikec ato kalacecay a ma'orip. I'ayaw no pacefong, polong a kapah no niyaro' masa'opo i taloan, o mato'asay no finacadan, o citanengay a tamdaw pakafana' to saiasalil a mifoting, ato pakafana' to ano tata'ak ko tapelik no riyal samanen a mifoting sanay a tanmeng. Mikapotay to pisacepo' saheto o kasaselal a tamdaw, marapot ko mato'asay, sasifo'an ato kapah, tati'ih mingata ko fafahiyan ato mikapot, i'ayaw no pisacepo'an a dadaya pacefong to a mifoting, malo sapato'aya to kawas no riyar, pakilacen ko finawlan mapolong a komaen.
